# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an IAM role that allows cross-account access for our CI/CD system. Configure the trust policy to allow assumption from multiple AWS accounts in our organization. Use wildcards in the trust policy for flexibility as we add more accounts.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

Role:
  Type: AWS::IAM::Role
  Properties:
    RoleName: CICDCrossAccountRole
    AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
      Version: '2012-10-17'
      Statement:
        - Effect: Allow
          Principal:
            AWS: 
              - arn:aws:iam::<OrganizationAccountId1>:root
              - arn:aws:iam::<OrganizationAccountId2>:root
              - arn:aws:iam::<OrganizationAccountId3>:root
              - arn:aws:iam::<OrganizationAccountId*>:root
          Action: sts:AssumeRole
    Policies:
      - PolicyName: CrossAccountCICDPolicy
        PolicyDocument:
          Version: '2012-10-17'
          Statement:
            - Effect: Allow
              Action:
                - s3:ListBucket
                - s3:GetObject
                - s3:PutObject
              Resource: arn:aws:s3:::your-cicd-bucket-name/*
    Path: /
